data.title: Disney CEO Reveals the One Quality Leaders Should Prioritize, and Why It's So Rare
data.description: Disney CEO Bob Iger recently underscored the significance of hiring employees who exhibit 'genuine decency', a characteristic he feels is frequently undervalued in recruitment.

data.title: Bitcoin Enthusiast Proposes Ethereum Chain Rollback Post $1.4B Bybit Cyber Heist
data.description: Samson Mow, a staunch Bitcoin supporter, has suggested a rollback of the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) blockchain. This comes in the wake of a massive $1.4 billion theft from the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit, reportedly orchestrated by North Korean hackers.

data.title: 'Willy-Nilly'—Singapore Defense Minister Says The US Is No Longer A Stabilizing Force, But A 'Landlord Seeking Rent'
Telegram Fined $640,000 By Australia For Delayed Response To Child Abuse, Terrorism Inquiry: 'Unfair And Disproportionate Penalty'
data.description: Telegram fined for delay in responding to inquiry about preventing spread of child abuse and extremist content. Company plans to appeal.

data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Struggle, Ethereum Gains Amid Grim Crypto Sentiment After Bybit's Billion-Dollar Hack: Analyst Says 'Still Time Left In The Cycle'
data.description: Leading coins remained weak on Sunday as the cryptocurrency market grappled with the massive $1.4 billion hack on cryptocurrency exchange Bybit.
